name: atlas_benchmark_set
description: Fixed research problems for milestone regression (A3B.15 / D3B.14).

problems.topic: PV soiling loss rates in arid climates
problems.objective: Estimate typical daily and annual soiling loss ranges for arid sites and cite primary sources.
problems.acceptance_notes: Findings include numeric ranges with units; contradictions surfaced; provenance to papers.

problems.topic: Optimal PV cleaning frequency vs cost
problems.objective: Summarize evidence for cleaning schedule economics under different soiling rates.
problems.acceptance_notes: At least two independent sources; cost drivers listed; open questions marked as hypotheses.

problems.topic: Dust deposition models for PV modules
problems.objective: Compare leading dust deposition / soiling accumulation models and their assumptions.
problems.acceptance_notes: Model names + key variables; gaps noted when variables missing.

problems.objective: Evidence on how rainfall events restore PV performance after soiling.
problems.acceptance_notes: Climate dependence acknowledged; stale software/API knowledge not required.

problems.topic: Spectral vs broadband irradiance soiling effects
problems.objective: Clarify whether soiling impacts are spectral-selective and when it matters.
problems.acceptance_notes: Contested claims split; confidence separate from evidence quality.

problems.objective: Durability and performance claims for anti-soiling coatings on glass.
problems.acceptance_notes: Field vs lab evidence distinguished by evidence level.

problems.objective: Does tracking change soiling loss relative to fixed tilt?
problems.acceptance_notes: If evidence thin, emit typed hypothesis not finding.

problems.objective: What dust properties drive adhesion and hard-to-remove layers?
problems.acceptance_notes: Material properties linked to cleaning difficulty.

problems.objective: Compare soiling sensor approaches and measurement uncertainty.
problems.acceptance_notes: Uncertainty ranges cited; manufacturer claims graded L2.

problems.objective: Typical inverter efficiency derating vs ambient temperature.
problems.acceptance_notes: Numeric derating with units; datasheet vs field distinguished.

problems.objective: Evidence for rear-side soiling contribution on bifacial modules.
problems.acceptance_notes: If sparse, gap card + hypothesis; do not invent consensus.

problems.topic: Snow shedding vs soiling on PV
problems.objective: Separate snow loss mechanisms from dust soiling; when each dominates.
problems.acceptance_notes: Climate regimes labeled; no false merge of snow and dust claims.

problems.topic: IEC / standards relevant to PV soiling
problems.objective: List effective standards and measurement methods for soiling.
problems.acceptance_notes: Freshness uses effective-date awareness; standards not auto-staled by age alone.

problems.objective: Survey ML approaches for soiling rate forecasting and reported errors.
problems.acceptance_notes: RMSE/MAE with units; train/test leakage risks noted if claimed.

problems.topic: Waterless cleaning methods for utility PV
problems.objective: Evidence on robotic / dry cleaning effectiveness and OPEX.
problems.acceptance_notes: Vendor L2 vs field L5 separated; contradictions surfaced.
